sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48320" key="qeo/teuktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-τευκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made by God</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πύργοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
